examples: They tried to handcuff him but, despite his injuries, he fought his way free.
The soldiers handcuff the ring leader and cover his head.
The hinged collar locked around Wells’ neck like a giant handcuff.
The golden handcuff of a long-term savings plan may give them a reason to avoid the salary chase.
Giuliani had his agents burst into Kidder, Peabody, throw Richard Wigton up against the wall and handcuff him.
